scripts.lint:all: npm run lint && npm run lint:hr && npm run lint:desk
scripts.diff: npx @google/design.md diff DESIGN.history/$(ls -t DESIGN.history | head -1) DESIGN.md
scripts.export:tailwind: mkdir -p exports && node scripts/build-tailwind-v4.mjs --source DESIGN.md > exports/tokens.css
scripts.export:tailwind:hr: mkdir -p exports && node scripts/build-tailwind-v4.mjs --source DESIGN.hr.md > exports/tokens.hr.css
scripts.export:tailwind:desk: mkdir -p exports && node scripts/build-tailwind-v4.mjs --source DESIGN.desk.md > exports/tokens.desk.css
scripts.export:tailwind:all: npm run export:tailwind && npm run export:tailwind:hr && npm run export:tailwind:desk
scripts.export:dtcg: mkdir -p exports && npx @google/design.md export --format dtcg DESIGN.md > exports/tokens.dtcg.json
scripts.verify: npm run sync:check && npm run lint:all
